description: Legal document. Bill of divorce, Fusṭāṭ. Dated: Monday, 10 Adar I 1537 Seleucid (9 February 1226 CE). This bill of divorce is one of forty under the T-S 10J2 shelfmark. The divorce is between Avraham b. Yosef and Naṣr bt. Yeshuʿa (or perhaps Naẓar bt. Yeshuʿa). The bottom of the fragment has been completely torn away and thus the names of the witnesses are missing. Another bill at T-S 10J2.38 was drafted for the same couple a month later. (Information from Goitein's index card)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בארמית מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
